title: How to manage the lifecycle of Amazon Machine Images using AMI Lineage for AWS

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — How to manage the lifecycle of Amazon Machine Images using A
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/19
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*amazonaws.com*'
            - '*cleanup-child-account-resources.sh*'
            - '*cleanup-organization-resources.sh*'
            - '*cleanup-shared-resources.sh*'
            - '*deploy-child-account-resources.sh*'
            - '*deploy-organization-resources.sh*'
            - '*deploy-shared-resources.sh*'
            - '*ec2.amazonaws.com*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
